violations.text: Raw animal foods (Shrimp) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (berries) in the two door reach in freezer. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door reach in. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2026

Wood is used in the construction of base of the mechanical dishwasher. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The cutting boards in the kitchen/prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2024
